name: away_cold_day_setback_heat
description: Cold day (high 45F): home at start, classification applies heat mode. User leaves at 09:00 — setback should use setback_HEAT (62F), NOT setback_cool. User returns at 17:00 — comfort_heat (70F) restored. Verifies cold-day away setback selects the correct setback direction.
notes: Key assertion: setback_applied with target=62F (setback_heat), not 79F (setback_cool).
Cold-day classification: hvac_mode='heat'. Away → setback_heat(62) + modifier(0) = 62F.
Covers Priority 6b away_cold_day from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Cold winter morning: indoor 69F (slightly below comfort_heat=70F), outdoor 32F
User leaves — cold day so setback should be setback_heat=62F (NOT setback_cool)
Classification cycle while away — should reapply heat setback (62F)

assertions.reason: Cold-day classification: heat mode at comfort_heat=70F
Away on cold/heat day: setback_heat=62F applied (NOT setback_cool — cold day test)
Classification while away on cold day: heat setback reapplied (62F), comfort NOT restored
occupancy_home on cold/heat day: comfort_heat=70F restored

verdict.summary: Cold-day away setback uses setback_heat (62F), not setback_cool; comfort restored on return
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (heat, 70F) → setback_applied (62F) on away → setback maintained on cycle → comfort_restored (70F) on return
verdict.expected_behavior: Away setback on cold/heat day targets setback_heat, mirroring the setback direction of the active classification
